summary: Phase 2 testing of GREXO AI Website Builder + Image Generator. Backend: ran iteration-1 regression suite (21/21 PASS) plus new Phase 2 suite (8 passed, 1 skipped, 1 deselected). Image flow is solid end-to-end (admin generation returns a valid JPEG/PNG base64 ~1.5MB, deducts exactly 2 credits/image from free user, per-user isolation holds, list endpoint excludes _id/user_id). Website flow: list/isolation/protected routes pass; backend-level /api/website/generate works for SMALL requests but consistently times out at the public ingress (60s) because LiteLLM internally retries the Claude call to ~3-4 minutes — same root cause flagged in iteration_1 as 'minor'. This now blocks the entire website-builder end-user flow. Frontend Playwright covered: full sidebar (nav-home/chat/website/images/profile/settings/logout), dashboard launchers (launch-chat/website/images), website page (textarea, all 5 site-type options, examples, history click -> preview iframe + 29kB code tab with valid <html), image page (prompt, style+aspect selects, count 1-4, generate, result-0 with data:image/png;base64 URI, hover -> zoom+download buttons, lightbox open/close+download), protected-route redirects for /dashboard/website and /dashboard/images, /me credit decrement confirmed (admin enterprise: 99980 -> 99974 across 3 single-image generations = 6 credits = 3 x 2/image). Fixed two blocker bugs during testing: (1) Re-introduced unknown-eslint-rule disable comments in lib/auth.jsx, ChatPage.jsx, WebsitePage.jsx, ImagePage.jsx caused a full-page CRA 'Compiled with problems' overlay that completely blocked the UI (identical to iteration_1 root cause). Stripped those comments. (2) WebsitePage.copyCode had an unhandled clipboard rejection: in some browser contexts (e.g. headless / non-secure / no user gesture) navigator.clipboard.writeText throws NotAllowedError, the unhandled promise rejection triggered CRA's runtime-error overlay and made the page unusable. Wrapped with try/catch + execCommand('copy') fallback + a user-visible toast on failure.

critical.issue: Returns 502 at the public ingress (~60s ingress timeout) because LiteLLM keeps retrying the Anthropic call (logs show retries every ~60s up to 4 minutes). Reproducible end-to-end via the public URL. Internally the request would eventually succeed (admin already has historical sites in DB from iteration_1). User impact: nobody can generate a NEW website through the live UI right now. Recommended fix: (a) cap LiteLLM internal retries to 1 and lower per-attempt timeout to ~40s, OR (b) move /api/website/generate to a streaming/SSE response so the ingress doesn't close at 60s, OR (c) make it an async job (POST returns job_id, GET polls).

minor.issue: Returns image bytes that begin with JPEG SOI (\xff\xd8\xff) — the underlying gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview returns JPEG even though the frontend tags it `data:image/png;base64,`. Browsers MIME-sniff so it renders fine, but downloads name files `.png` while the bytes are JPEG. Consider sniffing magic bytes server-side and returning a `mime` field, OR forcing PNG on the model.

action_items: HIGH: Fix the /api/website/generate ingress-timeout / LiteLLM retry storm. The website builder UI is currently unusable end-to-end through the public URL because the call exceeds the 60s ingress limit. See backend critical issue for three fix options.
LOW: Add a server-side image MIME sniff so the frontend can render with the correct content type (currently hard-coded image/png even when bytes are JPEG).

LOW (process): Stop re-adding `eslint-disable react-hooks/set-state-in-effect` and `react-hooks/purity` comments — those rules are NOT registered in this project's ESLint config and they elevate to errors -> a full-page CRA overlay that blocks ALL UI interactions. Already removed in this pass.
critical_code_review_comments: WebsitePage.copyCode was previously `await navigator.clipboard.writeText(...)` with no try/catch — any rejection (insecure context, missing user gesture, denied permission) became an unhandled rejection -> CRA overlay -> page unusable. Patched. Apply the same defensive try/catch to any future navigator.clipboard.* calls.

server.py /api/website/generate is a long-running synchronous LLM call (>60s typical, up to 4min on retries). For deployed UX, this MUST become streaming or async — the kubernetes ingress 60s cap will keep returning 502 to the user.

server.py response from /api/images/generate hard-codes nothing about MIME but emits raw base64; frontend assumes PNG. Add `mime: 'image/png' | 'image/jpeg'` to the response so client can render & save correctly.
Repeating iteration_1 finding: server.py is now ~539 lines — splitting into modules (auth/chat/billing/tools/admin) is overdue.
ImagePage hover-only download/zoom buttons mean keyboard users can't reach them; consider showing controls on focus too (a11y).

success_rate.backend: Phase 1 regression 21/21 (100%); Phase 2 8/10 (1 SKIP + 1 DESELECTED due to /website/generate ingress timeout, NOT a unit-test issue)
success_rate.frontend: All UI-side flows pass (sidebar, launchers, image E2E generation, lightbox, protected routes, credit deduction). Website new-generation E2E blocked by backend ingress 502 — listing/viewing prior websites works.

test_credentials: Admin admin@Grexo.ai / GrexoAdmin@2026 (seeded, enterprise 99974 credits remaining). New e2e users created via signup with test_p2_* prefix.
seed_data_creation: Phase 2 tests create test_p2_userA_* and test_p2_userB_* free accounts and generate ~1 image each for isolation tests. Not cleaned up (small footprint).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression baseline = /app/backend/tests/test_Grexo_api.py (21 tests) + /app/backend/tests/test_Grexo_phase2.py (10 tests). When running phase2, expect TestWebsiteBuilder::test_generate_website_admin to fail with 502 and test_credits_deducted_for_free_user to skip UNTIL the website-generate timeout is fixed. Frontend tip: if you see a full-page overlay covering the app, FIRST grep for `react-hooks/set-state-in-effect` and `react-hooks/purity` eslint-disable comments — they break the build. SECOND, check unhandled promise rejections (clipboard, etc) — CRA elevates them to a runtime-error overlay that swallows clicks.
rca_of_the_issue: Issue 1 (website 502): /api/website/generate calls LlmChat -> LiteLLM which internally retries claude-sonnet-4-5 every ~60s on first failure. Backend logs show 4 sequential 'LiteLLM completion()' lines at 60s apart for one user request. Total wall time exceeds the 60s ingress limit, so the kubernetes ingress returns 502 to the client before the backend finishes. Mitigation options: limit LiteLLM num_retries=1, lower request_timeout to 45s, return SSE/streamed HTML, or convert to async job pattern. Issue 2 (CRA overlay regression): The codebase still includes `/* eslint-disable react-hooks/set-state-in-effect */` (and a new `react-hooks/purity`) annotations introduced into the new ImagePage.jsx + WebsitePage.jsx (and re-added to auth.jsx, ChatPage.jsx). ESLint reports 'Definition for rule ... was not found' as an error, CRA's webpack-dev-server-overlay shows it full-screen and blocks pointer events. Fix: remove those orphan disable comments — they aren't doing anything anyway. Issue 3 (clipboard overlay): navigator.clipboard.writeText is restricted to secure contexts + user-initiated callbacks; in some preview environments it rejects, and an un-awaited unhandled rejection in WebsitePage.copyCode caused CRA's runtime-error overlay. Wrapped in try/catch with a textarea+execCommand fallback and a graceful toast.
